driver.find_element(By.ID, 'email').send_keys('wrong@test.com')
driver.find_element(By.ID, 'secret').send_keys('wrongpassword')
driver.find_element(By.ID, 'auth-button').click()
error_msg = WebDriverWait(driver, 5).until(EC.visibility_of_element_located((By.CLASS_NAME, 'error-message')))

driver.find_element(By.ID, 'secret').send_keys('wrongpassword')
driver.find_element(By.ID, 'sign-in').click()
